description: darwin-modules/apps/default.nix (lines 17-43) installs homebrew brews (container, jj, libusb, opencode, bun) and casks unconditionally on all hosts. Some of these are development-specific or work-specific. Gate with appropriate feature flags (machine.features.developer, machine.features.work, etc.). Similarly, features/default.nix line 14 unconditionally enables IPFS on all machines.
title: Add feature flag guards to unconditional homebrew packages
